Fallback/Failure Behavior: mode=mock returns 400; unavailable provider returns 503
User Impact: Good central control, but stale mock references remain elsewhere
Recommendation: Keep mock rejected or rename to explicit demo mode; remove stale types/docs

Fallback/Failure Behavior: Uses DB stored current_price if available; otherwise marks unavailable/missing
User Impact: Live mode can show stale DB prices if provider fails
Recommendation: Expose provider failure and stale status prominently on every consumer

Fallback/Failure Behavior: Timeout or failure persists provider_failed/missing; uploaded current price can remain
User Impact: Import can succeed while enrichment is incomplete/degraded
Recommendation: Poll status in upload UI and block 'fully ready' messaging until enrichment finishes

Fallback/Failure Behavior: Uses cost basis when trusted current price unavailable
User Impact: Portfolio value and weights can look valid despite missing market price
Recommendation: Show fallback counts and affected tickers at summary/dashboard level

Fallback/Failure Behavior: No user isolation; errors surfaced in hook
User Impact: Works locally but is global for all users
Recommendation: Add user ownership and auth before public deployment

Fallback/Failure Behavior: Frontend catch silently swallows errors; backend returns missing/status_by_ticker
User Impact: Users may not know quote enrichment failed
Recommendation: Return and render per-ticker quote status, missing list, and fetch error

Fallback/Failure Behavior: Per-index unavailable entries with reason; cached 2 minutes
User Impact: Graceful degradation, but all indices fail if Yahoo/DNS fails
Recommendation: Add provider health banner and secondary source or cached last-known-good strategy

Fallback/Failure Behavior: Returns empty arrays plus movers_status unavailable
User Impact: Can look empty if UI ignores movers_status
Recommendation: Ensure UI always renders movers_status reason for empty mover lists

Fallback/Failure Behavior: news_status distinguishes empty/unavailable
User Impact: Good status contract, but depends on one provider
Recommendation: Cache headlines and add provider-health/freshness display

Fallback/Failure Behavior: Visible beta placeholders only
User Impact: Mixed real and non-real market content
Recommendation: Hide until backed by provider or keep strongly disabled

Fallback/Failure Behavior: 404 for no data; provider returns source=unavailable in provider path
User Impact: Unsupported tickers degrade, but direct endpoint errors
Recommendation: Normalize error shapes and expose FMP key/provider coverage

Fallback/Failure Behavior: Unavailable rows included with status
User Impact: Usable but coverage can be partial
Recommendation: Show coverage percentage and unavailable tickers consistently

Provider or Source: _PEER_MAP first; FMP if configured and static miss
Fallback/Failure Behavior: No peers when both miss; meta exposes source/status
User Impact: Static peer universe can be stale
Recommendation: Use maintained peer dataset or provider-backed discovery with freshness metadata

Fallback/Failure Behavior: Per-peer 5s timeout; unavailable/timed_out listed in meta
User Impact: Good incomplete-state model
Recommendation: Keep; add tests for timeout/sparse set UI

Fallback/Failure Behavior: Missing key gives unavailable; provider errors become news_status unavailable
User Impact: No hidden mock news, but product incomplete without key/provider
Recommendation: Add provider SLA/freshness and cache; clarify empty vs unavailable in all views

Fallback/Failure Behavior: Returns empty events with events_status empty in many cases
User Impact: Can read as no events rather than no event provider
Recommendation: Integrate real events provider or mark feature unavailable/scaffolded

Fallback/Failure Behavior: Unavailable tickers excluded; insufficient data returns empty result with meta
User Impact: Analytics coverage can collapse under Yahoo failure
Recommendation: Improve external history provider strategy and display coverage in all risk views

Fallback/Failure Behavior: Returns source=unavailable; no synthetic fallback
User Impact: Relative metrics become null
Recommendation: Keep; add last-known-good benchmark cache

Fallback/Failure Behavior: Monte Carlo fallback when scipy unavailable
User Impact: Methodology varies by environment
Recommendation: Declare scipy/sklearn or expose method prominently

Fallback/Failure Behavior: Async build states; unavailable history noted
User Impact: Changes charts can be incomplete or unavailable
Recommendation: Add visible build failure recovery and retry controls

Fallback/Failure Behavior: fallback_used=True routes to local rule-based response
User Impact: Can look like advisor despite no AI provider
Recommendation: Centralize fallback ownership and label rule-based mode clearly

Fallback/Failure Behavior: Returns scaffold text
User Impact: Nonfunctional public surface
Recommendation: Remove or hide until implemented

Fallback/Failure Behavior: Disabled/scaffolded connector states
User Impact: Nonfunctional financial sync surface
Recommendation: Hide or implement secure OAuth and sync

Fallback/Failure Behavior: No backend/data pipeline
User Impact: Nonfunctional public surface
Recommendation: Hide or implement real screener

Fallback/Failure Behavior: Returns deprecated scaffold; ComingSoon page
User Impact: Duplicate/confusing with real /optimize
Recommendation: Remove route/page or redirect to /optimize

Fallback/Failure Behavior: Risk moved to /quant/full
User Impact: Potential stale consumer confusion
Recommendation: Deprecate from client and OpenAPI production contract

Fallback/Failure Behavior: Central runtime rejects mock mode
User Impact: Mostly unreachable but confusing
Recommendation: Delete or convert to explicit demo mode

Fallback/Failure Behavior: Types still mention mock/mock_fallback/scaffold defaults
User Impact: Future code can normalize old behavior
Recommendation: Clean schemas, regenerate types, update manual domain types

Fallback/Failure Behavior: No live validation
User Impact: Autocomplete may include stale/missing tickers
Recommendation: Add source/version or validate selected tickers on add
